Article Title: SKY as impact sub just precautionary: MI coach Jayawardene
Article Text:
Suryakumar Yadav (Pic credit: SKY's X post)

Go Beyond The Boundary with our YouTube channel.

Watch Greenstone Lobo predicts IPL 2026 winner Greenstone Lobo predicts IPL 2026 winner

MUMBAI: Quite a few fans were surprised to see India’s T20 skipper Suryakumar Yadav playing as an impact substitute in the Mumbai Indians ’ IPL opener against Kolkata Knight Riders here on Sunday, but MI head coach Mahela Jayawardene put a lid on speculation, saying it was merely a precautionary measure due to a niggle the ace batter is nursing after leading India to victory in the T20 World Cup.Jayawardene insisted there were no “unwanted stories” here. SKY did not field for MI in their first match of the season, though he scored an 8-ball 16 as the hosts hammered KKR by six wickets, recording their highest successful run chase in IPL history. “I hope we don’t create unwanted stories. The camp is happy. He wanted an extra couple of days off. He had a little tight groin and was doing fielding and all that, but I knew we had another five days from this game to the next. I just wanted to give him that extra bit of time.“He was even keen at the end to go and field for three-four overs, but I said it’s fine,” Jayawardene told reporters when quizzed on whether Suryakumar was being used as an impact substitute in the same manner as MI skipper Rohit Sharma last season, with no role in fielding. “So please don’t create any stories. I have to take precautions.“These are very valuable players, and I need them going throughout the season.These are calculated decisions that the management makes, and there is nothing beyond that,” Jayawardene said. Jayawardene was pleased that Mumbai Indians finally ended their winless run in IPL opening matches, which had stretched from 2013 to 2025.While he praised the batters, the former Sri Lanka captain was not entirely satisfied with the bowling. “Yeah, it is brilliant. It was a good batting wicket. When they got to 220, I thought we were a bit poor on execution. We probably gave 20 runs extra. But the way Ro (Rohit) and Ryan batted was exquisite to watch. “It was also tactical, because if we use Allah (AM Ghazanfar) and Hardik up front, we can’t have too many new-ball bowlers. I needed options in the middle and at the back end, and that was the thinking when we traded Shardul. It’s about thinking differently with our bowling combinations to suit different opposition and how we want to go about it,” he said.
Article Summary: Suryakumar Yadav played as an impact substitute in Mumbai Indians' IPL opener against Kolkata Knight Riders. MI head coach Mahela Jayawardene says it was merely a precautionary measure due to a niggle the ace batter is nursing after leading India to victory in T20 World Cup.

Article Title: Asian Cup Qualifiers: Spotlight on Ryan Williams as India face Hong Kong
Article Text:
Ryan Williams (ANI Photo)

Watch Football returns to Delhi! SC Delhi gear up for first ISL home game Football returns to Delhi! SC Delhi gear up for first ISL home game

KOCHI: All eyes will be on Ryan Williams when India take on Hong Kong in their final AFC Asian Cup 2027 qualifier at the JLN stadium on Tuesday. While both sides are already out of contention, this fixture is far from just a mere formality, with valuable FIFA ranking points still up for grabs and a chance for India to sign off on a positive note in front of their home fans.Much of the spotlight will be on 32-year-old winger Williams, who is set to make his India debut. Born in Perth, Williams drew attention last year, when he relinquished his Australian citizenship to represent India. Despite the buzz around his potential inclusion, head coach Khalid Jamil remained non-committal, noting that the team has multiple attacking options and that a final decision on the lineup would only be made on Tuesday morning.India head into the game placed at the bottom of Group C with just two points from five games. Even a win over Hong Kong would not be enough to lift them off the foot of the table, as third-placed Bangladesh, with five points, hold the advantage on head-to-head record.India are also the only team in the group yet to secure a victory.Jamil said that this game could be a dive into the unknown for India, given the slew of changes in the Hong Kong squad. “We are already out of contention, but we need to finish strong. A lot has changed since we played Hong Kong last year. They have a new team and a new coach,” Jamil said.
Article Summary: India take on Hong Kong in their final AFC Asian Cup 2027 qualifier at the JLN stadium on Tuesday. Both sides are already out of contention, with valuable FIFA ranking points still up for grabs. India head into the game placed at the bottom of Group C with just two points from five games.

Article Title: PBKS vs GT: In this run-fest, can bowlers claw back?
Article Text:
Ricky Ponting and Matthew Hayden (Video grab)

Watch Greenstone Lobo predicts IPL 2026 winner Greenstone Lobo predicts IPL 2026 winner

Go Beyond The Boundary with our YouTube channel.

ALSO READ:

Poll How do you feel about the traditional strategies for bowlers mentioned by Hayden? They are still relevant today. Bowlers need new tactics.

NEW CHANDIGARH: There is a particular sound that has come to define the IPL evening these days — not the applause of a boundary, but the thud of a ball disappearing several rows back, followed by a collective murmur that asks: How far did that go?In this version of T20 cricket, now 200 is not even a par total. For the bowlers, increasingly in the IPL, it feels like survival rather than contest. Ricky Ponting and Matthew Hayden , two men who spent much of their careers making bowlers’ lives miserable, now sit in IPL dugouts as coaches and watch their bowlers suffer.The IPL, always a batter’s playground, has leaned into excess nowadays. The Impact Player rule, Punjab Kings’ Ponting suggested, hasn’t just deepened batting line-ups; it has liberated them. “It’s a really hard thing for the bowlers now,” Ponting said. “The modern T20 batter… they’re big, strong athletes. The bowler has to miss by a couple of inches on line or on length, and they pay the penalty. The ball is going over the fence and it’s going a long way over. ”“The margin for error has shrunk to something almost invisible,” said Gujarat Titans’ Hayden, “Once upon a time in the IPL, the approach was incremental...from taking a single to hitting a six. Now, it is on the other spectrum. Six, four… then maybe a single. It is a reversal not just of order, but of philosophy.”When intent is this absolute, how do you disrupt it? The answers, both coaches agree, are not revolutionary, but old-fashioned and executed with precision.Hayden listed them out like a checklist: wide yorkers, yorkers at the stumps, slower offcutters into the pitch. “Variations are not new, accuracy is everything. You don’t have to be a rocket scientist,” Hayden said, “But you do have to be near-perfect.”Ponting leaned into the tactical. “Change of angles, better use of the bouncer. The search for the unfamiliar — a mystery spinner, perhaps, someone who can buy a few deliveries of doubt in a format that rarely allows it,” he said.
Article Summary: The IPL has leaned into excess nowadays. The Impact Player rule hasn’t just deepened batting line-ups; it has liberated them. Ricky Ponting and Matthew Hayden, two men who spent much of their careers making bowlers’ lives miserable, now sit as coaches.

Article Title: Russian photographer’s ‘pink elephant’ shoot in Jaipur sparks animal safety concern
Article Text:
A Russian photographer's viral photoshoot featuring a bright pink-painted elephant in Jaipur has sparked online criticism and ethical concerns

‘Herbal colours used, washed in 30 mins’

Poll Do you think it is ethical to use animals for artistic projects? Yes, if done safely No, it's unethical

JAIPUR: A viral photo-shoot in the city featuring an elephant painted in bright pink triggered a wave of criticism online and renewed concerns about the use of animals in creative projects.The images, shot in Nov 2025 by Russian photographer, Julia Buruleva, resurfaced on social media in March and quickly drew attention for their striking visuals as well as the ethical questions they raise.Buruleva first shared the ‘pink elephant' post on Instagram in Dec 27, 2025. Later, in a post on Feb 18 on the same platform, she said, "For anyone worried about the elephant — we used organic, locally made paint, the same kind locals use for festivals, so it was absolutely safe for the animal."In another post on March 20, Buruleva explained that the concept came to her during her first week in Jaipur. She wrote that elephants are deeply associated with Rajasthan and are visible in the city's streets, ornaments, and architecture.Wanting to include one in her work, she said she chose to paint the animal a solid bright pink, describing it as the most popular colour in Rajasthan. She also wrote the shoot took place at an abandoned temple of Lord Ganesha, calling it a fitting setting.On Monday, members from Amer's Hathi Gaon said the elephant was cleaned within 30 minutes of the shoot to ensure that the animal faced no discomfort because of the colour.“This elephant, Chanchal, was under the care of someone who lived outside Hathi Gaon, therefore it was available for the project. The photographer was researching for her project last year and she came across the elephant caretaker who agreed to it. The whole process was safe for the animal, as only herbal colours were used and it was washed within 30 minutes,” Ballu Khan, president of Hathi Gaon Vikas Samiti, said.Another photographer who was part of the team, speaking anonymously, said the shoot was purely an artistic expression and did not harm the animal. “This is just an expression of art and in no way did the team harm the animal. Organic colours were used to paint both the animal and the model and the shoot was completed within 25 minutes, after which the animal was handed over to its caretaker,” the photographer said.Despite the assurances, many social media users condemned the photo-shoot.Commenting on one of the posts, Aakash Prabhakar, a filmmaker, said: “... An elephant is not a canvas. It’s not a prop. Whether the paint is ‘non-toxic’ or the handler is experienced does not change the fact that this is a wild animal being used for aesthetic value...”Reacting to the controversy, Buruleva posted on Instagram on Monday, “I didn’t expect this attention actually...”In the past, as part of her Art Expedition, Buruleva undertook a project where she painted camels in the Sahara Desert in Morocco, the pictures of which she shared on social media.
Article Summary: Photographer Julia Buruleva's photo-shoot in Jaipur has sparked online criticism and ethical concerns. The images, shot in Nov 2025, resurfaced on social media in March and quickly drew attention for their striking visuals as well as the ethical questions they raise.

Article Title: Israel Adesanya: Israel Adesanya emotional confession before Joe Pyfer fight gets unexpected Gina Carano response amid losing streak
Article Text:
Israel Adesanya and Gina Carano (Image Via Getty)

Israel Adesanya and Gina Carano exchange emotional words as UFC struggles continue and future questions rise

The fight did not even begin yet, but Israel Adesanya had already given fans a moment they won’t forget. Before stepping into his recent bout against Joe Pyfer, the former UFC champion shared a heartfelt video online. He thanked fans for standing by him through wins and losses. His voice slowed down, his eyes filled up, and it felt real. It was not about hype. It was about everything he has been carrying lately.That video quickly reached a lot of people, including Gina Carano. She watched it and decided to respond in her own way. Around the same time, questions were already building around Adesanya’s form, as he had been going through a tough run in his career. So when Carano spoke, people paid attention.Gina Carano shared her thoughts on Instagram Stories, and her words were full of support. She wrote, “Izzy…it’s anytime we get to see your soul shine through, it’s an experience, it’s precious, it’s so unique and authentic. Win or lose and whatever you choose to do. There are no boxes to put you in. You’re art, you’re free. That is worth following the journey you share with us.”She did not stop there. Carano also reminded him that fighting is just one part of life. She added, “It’s not about the fight, it’s about the journey, fighting is just one beautiful piece. You’re a human being, who shares the precious moments and wisdom and vulnerability you share that makes this world better. In whatever you do, play the long game, keep that sparkle, do something for you.”Coming into the fight, Adesanya was already under pressure. He had lost three fights in a row, and this bout against Joe Pyfer was seen as a chance to bounce back. Early on, things looked decent for him. But in the second round, the fight slipped away, and Pyfer secured a big win.After that loss, many started asking the same question. Is Israel Adesanya thinking about stepping away from the sport? But the fighter quickly cleared that up. He made it clear that he is not done yet.Adesanya said, “You keep going. Again, and again, and again, and again, and again. I’m not leaving. You’ll never stop me… I might get beat, but I will always remain undefeated.”For now, even with losses stacking up, Adesanya’s focus seems clear. He is not walking away. And with voices like Gina Carano backing him, the story feels far from over.
Article Summary: Israel Adesanya and Gina Carano exchange emotional words as UFC struggles continue and future questions rise. Before stepping into his recent bout against Joe Pyfer, the former UFC champion shared a heartfelt video online. He thanked fans for standing by him through wins and losses. That video quickly reached a lot of people, including Carano.

Article Title: Nina Marie Daniele: “You’re a terrible content creator”: Nina Marie Daniele fires back at Steiny over Georgio Poullas remark in Arman Tsarukyan controversy
Article Text:
Nina Marie Daniele fires back at Steiny over Georgio Poullas remark in Arman Tsarukyan controversy (Image via Getty)

Nina-Marie Daniele slams Steiny after Georgio Poullas comment and Arman Tsarukyan press conference drama

Nina-Marie Daniele did not stay quiet after a recent online debate turned personal. She called out content creator Steiny for defending Georgio Poullas after a comment made during a press event involving Arman Tsarukyan. The issue started during a promotional event before Tsarukyan’s rematch with Poullas. Things got tense when Poullas tried to provoke Tsarukyan by calling Daniele his “girlfriend.” Tsarukyan quickly reacted and made it clear that such comments were not okay. He asked for basic respect and said lines should not be crossed just to promote a fight.Soon after, Daniele also stepped in and said the comment was disrespectful and unnecessary. What could have stayed as a small moment quickly turned into a bigger online debate when Steiny shared his opinion.Steiny reacted to the situation online and suggested that Nina-Marie Daniele may have overreacted. He pointed out that her content often includes fun and casual interactions with fighters, so this moment should not have been taken too seriously. But Daniele strongly disagreed.She posted a long response on X, where she directly addressed Steiny and also spoke about their past interactions.She made it clear that this was not just about one comment, but also about respect and boundaries.She wrote,“Steiny, for years, you have been asking me to come on your pod. I’ve said no to you… So you asked Jon to ask me… I said Nah… You asked Arman’s team… I said nah. You are a terrible content creator. You don’t research your guests… You ride the coattails of Kyle, Bradley, Stevewilldoit, Bob Menery [actual talented content creators]. Without attractive girls on your pod, nobody would watch.”She then added,“You are an entitled kid with no interviewing skills, and you’re bitter I said ‘no’ to you so many times. Work on your craft and do better. Lastly, there’s a difference between being in on the bit and being used for the bit - I’m not going to let someone use me for a bit for their own promo. But you wouldn’t know the difference because all you do is use people and expect them to be ok with it. Get f***ed and stay out of my DMs.”Daniele has also made it clear again that her connection with Arman Tsarukyan is strictly professional. Despite fans often guessing otherwise because of their on-camera chemistry, she has denied any personal relationship.Meanwhile, inside the competition, Arman Tsarukyan stayed focused. He went on to defeat Georgio Poullas with a clear 9-3 points win in their wrestling rematch at RAF 7.
Article Summary: Nina-Marie Daniele slams Steiny after Georgio Poullas comment and Arman Tsarukyan press conference drama. She called Steiny a terrible content creator and said he was an entitled kid with no interviewing skills. She also denied any personal relationship with Arman and called him a professional.

Article Title: Trisha Paytas: Trisha Paytas and Moses Hacmon controversy takes shocking turn as leaked messages and Ethan Klein response add new twist
Article Text:
Trisha Paytas and Moses Hacmon controversy takes shocking turn as leaked messages and Ethan Klein response add new twist (Image via Getty)

Trisha Paytas, Moses Hacmon, and Ethan Klein: What the leaked messages and reactions reveal





The internet is once again talking about Trisha Paytas and her husband Moses Hacmon. This time, it is not about their content or family updates. Instead, serious claims have come out through leaked messages that started spreading in late March 2026. These messages have raised concerns and left fans confused about what is really happening behind the scenes.The situation became bigger when influencer reporter Rich Lux shared screenshots online. The messages show Moses Hacmon making strong claims about his marriage. He allegedly talks about fear, control, and physical harm. The situation gained more momentum when old footage of Trisha Paytas became available to the public. The two parties have not verified these claims yet, but the dispute has intensified.According to posts shared by Rich Lux, Moses Hacmon allegedly described his relationship as unsafe. In one message, he said, “She has gone after me multiple times with a knife since we’ve been together. The abuse I go through day with T is bad. I wish I could leave now.”He also mentioned injuries, saying, “She is so controlling Everything I say or do is wrong.She’s so abusive. She hit me in the eye last week and punched me in the stomach. The bruises on my arms and legs arm almost healed now thought.”Another message added, “it is scary. Everyday im scared for my life. I’m not allowed to talk to my family unless she is there listening to the full conversation and seeing them is just out of the question. I will get back to you when I can. This is the worst relationship I’ve ever been in.”At the same time, an old TikTok live clip of Trisha Paytas started circulating again. In that clip, she said, “I hit him last summer; it doesn’t matter, the circumstances. Like, I hit him, and that gets thrown in my face all the time. It’s fine, but I’m not a domestic abuser.”The situation grew further when Ethan Klein reacted on Instagram Stories on March 28, 2026. He criticized Trisha Paytas after she shared a post about her mother-in-law. Ethan said, “My mother-in-law is one of the nicest people alive. You’d have to be the biggest piece of sh*t alive to say she’s toxic.” He also added, “Moses has already gone no-contact with her for years, you already won. This is just cruel.”For now, these claims are based on leaked messages and social media reactions. There has been no official confirmation from Trisha Paytas or Moses Hacmon directly addressing all details. The situation is still developing, and many are waiting for a clear response from both sides.
Article Summary: The internet is once again talking about Trisha Paytas and her husband Moses Hacmon. This time, it is not about their content or family updates. Instead, serious claims have come out through leaked messages. These messages have raised concerns and left fans confused about what is really happening behind the scenes.

Article Title: John Tortorella: How John Tortorella's arrival will impact the Vegas Golden Knights ahead of the NHL playoffs
Article Text:
Tortorella is a veteran 2004 Stanley Cup–winning head coach with more than two decades of NHL experience (Image via Getty Images)

John Tortorella’s hiring might boost the Vegas Golden Knights to lead the NHL playoffs

The Vegas Golden Knights have made a dramatic last-minute coaching change, firing the team’s head coach, Bruce Cassidy, and signing veteran NHL coach John Tortorella to steer the team through the final stretch of the 2025-26 regular season and, if possible, into the Stanley Cup Playoffs. According to reports, the coaching change came with just eight games left in the regular season, showing the team is making an aggressive push ahead of the playoffs.It is to be noted that Bruce Cassidy has been at the helm of the Vegas Golden Knights’ Stanley Cup win in 2023, and in came John Tordella to finish out the year. Earlier, Tortorella coached the Flyers for nearly three seasons, with a record of 97-107-33. Previously, he was suspended for two games and fined $50,000 for arguing with referees. But will John Tortorella's arrival benefit the Golden Knights in their upcoming NHL playoffs?The Vegas Golden Knights made a shocking late-season move by firing head coach Bruce Cassidy and hiring veteran coach John Tortorella, a decision that could significantly impact their Stanley Cup chances this season.According to General Manager Kelly McCrimmon, the team needed a new direction and believes that Tortorella's experience can help the team at a crucial point in the season. Despite recent struggles, including losing six of their last seven games, the Golden Knights are still in a playoff position, which is why management decided to bring in Tortorella to provide a late-season spark.It is important to note that Tortorella is a veteran 2004 Stanley Cup–winning head coach with more than two decades of NHL experience.With this joining, he will return to the league after a season away, having recently served as an assistant with the gold‑medal‑winning U.S. team at the 2026 Winter Olympics. Considering his rich experience in managing a team, Tortorella’s arrival could greatly impact the Vegas Golden Knights in their playoff push.As for Cassidy, he spent four seasons with the Golden Knights, leading them to a record of 178-99-43 in 320 regular-season games, which also included two 50-win seasons, and the franchise’s first Stanley Cup victory. However, the season did not go well with Cassidy, and thus, it resulted in the veteran bench boss losing his job.Further, the Golden Knights enter the week with a 32-26-16 record, with 80 points, sitting third in the Pacific Division. It is for sure that they are taking a risk by changing coaches so late in the season, but if Tortorella can quickly fix the team's defensive and goaltending issues, Vegas could become a dangerous team in the Stanley Cup playoffs.
Article Summary: John Tortorella is a veteran 2004 Stanley Cup–winning head coach with more than two decades of NHL experience. He will return to the league after a season away, having recently served as an assistant with the gold‑medal‑winning U.S. team at the 2026 Winter Olympics. Bruce Cassidy has been at the helm of the Vegas Golden Knights’ Stanley Cup win in 2023, and in came John Tordella to finish the year.

Article Title: Carlos Alcaraz: Carlos Alcaraz breaks silence after Jannik Sinner Miami Open dominance as Sunshine Double shakes ATP rankings race
Article Text:
Carlos Alcaraz and Jannik Sinner (Image Via Getty)

Carlos Alcaraz and Jannik Sinner rivalry shows respect despite Miami Open result

It was not just about winning a title. When Jannik Sinner lifted the Miami Open trophy, he completed something very special: the Sunshine Double. And even before the buzz settled, Carlos Alcaraz quietly showed the kind of respect that says a lot about where this rivalry stands.Instead of ignoring the moment or keeping silent, Alcaraz chose to speak. He kept it simple but real. On Instagram, he wrote, “Congratulations @janniksin and team for winning the Sunshine Double!” It was not a long message, but it felt honest. In a sport where rivalries can quickly turn tense, this one still feels clean and respectful.This rivalry is still young, but it already feels important. When Alcaraz spoke after one of their recent matches, he said, “It was a tough match. I’m sure we will play more matches like this.” That line explains everything. They push each other, but there is no bitterness.Now, looking at the Miami Open run, Sinner had everything going his way. He stayed sharp through the tournament and added another big title to his name. Completing the Sunshine Double winning both Indian Wells and Miami in the same stretch is not easy. Very few players manage it.On the other side, Alcaraz had a quieter run. He reached the semi-finals at Indian Wells but could not go further.Then in Miami, his campaign ended earlier than expected. Still, his reaction after Sinner’s win did not feel forced. It felt natural.That is what makes this rivalry different. They are not close friends, but they understand each other. They know what it takes to win at this level. And maybe that is why the respect stays strong.There is also another layer to this story: the rankings. After Miami, the ATP rankings show that the gap between them is getting smaller. Right now, Sinner is just 1,190 points behind Alcaraz. That is not a big gap in today’s tennis.What makes things more interesting is what comes next. Alcaraz has over 4,000 ranking points to defend before Roland Garros. Sinner, meanwhile, has only 1,950 points to protect. This gives the Italian a clear chance to catch up, and maybe even move ahead if results go his way.So while Alcaraz is still ahead today, the pressure is slowly building. And with the way Sinner is playing, this race could change quickly in the next few months.For now, though, one thing is clear. This rivalry is not just about competition. It is also about respect and that is what makes it worth watching.
Article Summary: Carlos Alcaraz and Jannik Sinner's rivalry is still young, but it already feels important. This rivalry is not just about competition, it is also about respect and that is what makes it worth watching. The ATP rankings show that the gap between them is getting smaller.

Article Title: John Cena: “I’m headed to WrestleMania!”: WWE legend John Cena announces his comeback as host of WrestleMania 42 in Las Vegas
Article Text:
John Cena has confirmed his return to the WWE as the official host of WrestleMania 42 in Las Vegas. (Image via BCCL)

Retired WWE legend John Cena set to host WrestleMania 42 in Las Vegas

WWE legend John Cena has officially confirmed his return to WWE and announced on Monday that he will serve as the official host of WrestleMania 42 in Las Vegas. This sudden announcement marks Cena's return to WWE programming after he retired from in-ring competition in 2025.WrestleMania 42 is scheduled to take place on April 18 and 19, 2026, at Allegiant Stadium in Las Vegas, and will be a two-night event featuring stars from WWE’s Raw and SmackDown brands. Cena revealed in his official statement that although he will not be competing in a match, he will serve as the event's official host and will be part of the show in a special role.As WrestleMania is just a few weeks away, the legend took to his social media handle to announce his return for the Show of Shows, where he appeared and won numerous titles as a wrestler, making countless memories over the years. WWE veteran legend John Cena is stepping back onto The Grandest Stage of Them All as the host of WrestleMania 42, as reported by WWE on Monday. The Greatest of All Time broke the news on social media that he is heading to Las Vegas. The 17-time World Champion, who retired from in-ring competition last December after his loss to Gunther at Saturday Night's Main Event, is now making his first return to WWE since his retirement.The Cenation Leader made the official announcement on his Twitter/X account, stating, Since retirement, my “road” has looked a little different… but now I can officially say I’m headed to WrestleMania!!!! See you in Las Vegas!Previously, Cena was a part of WrestleMania 41, where he fought against Cody Rhodes and defeated the American Nightmare, with the help of US rapper Travis Scott.Besides, as a part of his retirement tour, Cena won several titles and significant WWE events before bidding goodbye to the ring.During his retirement tour, Cena featured against WWE legends like Cody Rhodes, Randy Orton, CM Punk, Brock Lesnar, and Gunther, against whom he competed in his final WWE match, marking an end to his illustrious career at the Saturday Night’s Main Event on December 13, 2025.Moreover, Cena won the Elimination Chamber last year against Cody Rhodes. This match became the talk of the town, as Cena turned ‘heel’ for the first time. His collaboration with Dwayne ‘The Rock’ Johnson helped him win the Elimination Chamber.However, Cena later returned to becoming the ‘baby face’, towards the end of his retirement tour. The world champion retired from in-ring competition last December after his loss to Gunther at Saturday Night’s Main Event, and this year, in 2026, WrestleMania 42 will mark his first WWE appearance since retirement.With Cena now officially part of WrestleMania 42, fans can expect a major presence from the WWE legend at The Grandest Stage of Them All in Las Vegas.
Article Summary: WrestleMania 42 is scheduled to take place on April 18 and 19, 2026, at Allegiant Stadium in Las Vegas. This sudden announcement marks Cena's return to WWE programming after he retired from in-ring competition in 2025. Cena revealed in his official statement that although he will not be competing in a match, he will serve as the event's official host.

Article Title: Garrett Wilson: Garrett Wilson’s New York Jets tied to $11 million Los Angeles Chargers wide receiver
Article Text:
Garrett Wilson’s New York Jets tied to $11 million Los Angeles Chargers wide receiver (Image via Getty: Los Angeles Chargers logo and New York Jets logo)

NFL Trade Rumors : Garrett Wilson’s Jets linked to Chargers WR Quentin Johnston

Los Angeles WR’s fifth year option could land him in New York

When a quarterback targets a wide receiver less frequently, does that wideout become a tradable option? Is that what’s happening with Los Angeles Chargers WR Quentin Johnston?Johnston recorded 90-95 targets in his final year with the TCU Horned Frogs in 2022. In the first year of his NFL career, he recorded 67 targets. His targets then shifted from 91 in 2024 to 78 in 2025. This trajectory will likely affect his future with the Justin Herbert-led franchise.ESPN’s Rich Cimini reports that Johnston is a trade possibility for Garrett Wilson’s New York Jets. There are other competitors too: Jacksonville Jaguars’ Brian Thomas Jr., Green Bay Packers’ Dontayvion Wicks, and Baltimore Ravens’ Rashod Bateman. However, let’s study Johnston’s situation in depth.Cimini’s suggestion that the Los Angeles wideout is a trade possibility arose during a discussion about the Jets. He noted that New York has addressed every positional need in 2026 free agency with one exception: wide receiver. Interestingly, the GM Darren Mougey himself was once a wide receiver on the gridiron.Anyhow, Kansas City Chiefs head coach Andy Reid predicts that several teams will pick most of the top receivers by Day 2 of the draft.This could align with Mougey’s plan as he holds four picks in the top 44. He may draft a WR on Day 2, or he could trade for a veteran. He has a rich history of completing 12 trades in just over a year.Cimini also notes that this offseason has been specifically active for wide receiver trades. So, trading for someone like Los Angeles’ Quentin Johnston could happen in New York’s realm.Beyond his target share, Johnston has so far recorded 144 receptions on 243 targets, totaling 1,877 receiving yards and 18 touchdowns in 46 games [31 starts] over three seasons.The 24-year-old had a breakout season in 2025 despite his progress being temporarily derailed by a hamstring injury in the week leading up to Week 6. Anyhow, a change of atmosphere may help bring out the best [full potential] in him.According to Heavy Sports’ Paul Esden Jr., the 2023 first-round pick is an attractive trade option for the Jets. The 6-foot-2, 208-pounder is only 24 years old. Over the last two seasons, he has recorded 106 receptions, 1,446 receiving yards, and 16 total touchdowns.According to Spotrac, Johnston signed a four-year, $14.2M contract that includes a $7.3M signing bonus, $14.2M in guaranteed money, and a $3.5M average annual salary. In 2026, he is scheduled to earn a $2.6M base salary while carrying a $4.5M cap hit and a $4.5M dead cap value. His total career earnings over three years are roughly $11M.FanSided’s Alexander Insdorf reports that in May 2026 the Chargers may have to decide on Johnston’s fifth-year option. The option is projected to be worth $18M. If the Chargers decline it, Johnston will become an unrestricted free agent in 2027, following the conclusion of the 2026 season.Insdorf notes that while $18M is reasonable for a WR2, Johnston has yet to earn a new contract or a long-term commitment from Los Angeles. He has not yet recorded a 1,000-plus yard season.If the Chargers turn down the wideout’s fifth-year option, two more scenarios emerge. GM Joe Hortiz could keep him and offer an extension later. That is, if his stats improve in 2026, the team could let him enter free agency in exchange for a compensatory pick, or they could trade him as an “expiring contract.”ESPN’s Jeremy Fowler has called Quentin Johnston a potential trade target, alongside others like Baltimore Ravens’ Rashod Bateman, Philadelphia Eagles’ A. J. Brown, Green Bay Packers’ Dontayvion Wicks and Jayden Reed.Johnston was recently linked to Geno Smith-led Jets. Would he become a favorite target for Smith in New York [after Garrett Wilson] or remain a top target for Justin Herbert in Los Angeles [after Ladd McConkey]? Only time will tell...
Article Summary: Johnston recorded 90-95 targets in his final year with the TCU Horned Frogs in 2022. In the first year of his NFL career, he recorded 67 targets. His targets then shifted from 91 in 2024 to 78 in 2025. This trajectory will likely affect his future with the Justin Herbert-led franchise.

Article Title: Dk Metcalf: DK Metcalf’s Pittsburgh Steelers linked to $275M Cincinnati Bengals quarterback
Article Text:
DK Metcalf’s Pittsburgh Steelers linked to $275M Cincinnati Bengals quarterback (Image via Getty: Pittsburgh Steelers logo and Cincinnati Bengals logo)

NFL Trade Rumors : DK Metcalf’s Pittsburgh connected to Cincinnati QB Joe Burrow

Bengals QB Joe Burrow joining Steelers would never come true

The Cincinnati Bengals lost their most valuable defensive end, Trey Hendrickson, to the Lamar Jackson-led Baltimore Ravens this offseason. This news may have affected their star quarterback, Joe Burrow; so much so that he recently spoke with Steelers legend James Harrison, who is reportedly trying to recruit him to Pittsburgh.During the Deebo & Joe podcast, Harrison asked legendary Steelers QB Ben Roethlisberger about the possibility of Burrow joining the team. The two-time Super Bowl champion described such a move as a pipe dream and said, “It’s no brainer; you’d jump through hoops for that.” Roethlisberger expressed his interest in seeing Burrow play for Pittsburgh.If Burrow comes to DK Metcalf’s franchise, what would happen to Aaron Rodgers ? Perhaps, Burrow’s interest in the Steelers was sparked by what he sees in Rodgers. Yes, it was Harrison who reportedly brought Burrow’s attention to Pittsburgh, but Burrow has long admired the veteran QB. Let’s go back in time and know how.The Cincinnati QB saw a 41-year-old Pittsburgh signal-caller truly enjoy playing football in 2025. He witnessed how he took the team to win a division title and a 10-6 record. This may have prompted the 29-year-old Burrow to stop contemplating “early retirement” and look for a place where a quarterback could enjoy playing his favorite sport.Burrow grew up watching Rodgers. As a lifelong fan, whenever Monday Night Football or Sunday Night Football came around, he’d always hope the veteran was on it.The LSU alum once remarked that Rodgers “revolutionized” the quarterback position, noting that high-level quarterbacks coaches now teach the game based on how Rodgers did it.Burrow would love to talk to the veteran and find out about his journey. He looks up to him. He admires the way the veteran handles fame. He admits that they go through a lot, but the veteran has managed to stay the same through it all.Both QBs have their own hobbies: one has the piano [Burrow] while the other has an ayahuasca retreat [Rodgers]. Both hobbies work in different ways. But their 2025 outcomes? Rodgers posted his career-best stats at 41. While Burrow was sidelined for several games due to a grade 3 turf toe injury at just 29.This may have made Bengals QB contemplate early retirement because at his season-ending press conference, he said, “If I wanna keep doing this, I have to have fun doing it…I’ve been through a lot…If it’s not fun, then what am I doing it for? That’s the mindset I’m trying to bring to the table.”He saw Rodgers have fun in Pittsburgh. Maybe that’s why he’s talking to a Steelers legend this offseason. Harrison revealed he has been talking to Burrow for weeks now. “He [Burrow]’s going to go up there and talk to Mr. [Mike] Brown [Bengals owner] to see what he needs to do, whatever he needs to do to maybe get into some black and gold,” Harrison said.This could be Harrison’s dream alone. Because some analysts are straight-out denying it.Sports Illustrated’s Zach Pressnell calls Harrison’s idea of Burrow joining Pittsburgh as one of the most outrageous statements of the 2026 offseason.Harrison may be serious about calling Burrow to Pittsburgh, but no matter what the legend claims, or the superstar quarterback is telling him: Burrow is not going to the Steelers. Yes, Pittsburgh needs a quarterback. Yes, Burrow could be an ideal target. But “there’s no world where this idea could ever come to reality,” Pressnell wrote.As per Spotrac, the Ohio State alum signed a five-year, $275M contract extension, including $219M in guaranteed money, with Cincinnati in September 2023. This keeps him through 2029. He is scheduled to earn a $25M base salary and a $10M signing bonus while carrying a $47M cap hit and a $74M dead cap value in 2026. His total career earnings are $177M.Now, would Harrison’s idea come to fruition? Only time will tell…
Article Summary: Pittsburgh Steelers legend James Harrison is reportedly trying to recruit Bengals quarterback Joe Burrow to the Steelers. Ben Roethlisberger described such a move as a pipe dream and said, “It’s no brainer; you’d jump through hoops for that” Burrow signed a five-year, $275M contract extension in September.

Article Title: Francis Ngannou: Francis Ngannou shares his two cents on tactical battle as Alex Pereira faces Ciryl Gane in UFC Freedom 250 clash, places his bets on this star
Article Text:
Francis Ngannou (Image Via Getty Images)

Francis Ngannou sees Ciryl Gane’s movement as key advantage against Alex Pereira



The heavyweight showdown between Alex Pereira and Ciryl Gane is getting a huge buzz ahead of Freedom 250. Champion fighter Francis Ngannou has shared his thoughts. He believes the fight will be very competitive. Both fighters will be bringing unique strengths into the cage.Ngannou, who has fought Gane before, expects a tactical contest rather than a simple power battle. Pereira is known for his knockout power and strong frame. While, Gane’s speed and movement could change the dynamic of the fight. The former champion feels this contrast in styles will make it difficult to predict a clear winner, adding more excitement to the highly anticipated co-main event.Francis Ngannou believes this fight will come down to style and strategy. Speaking to TMZ, he explained that Alex Pereira has the size and strength to compete at heavyweight. He described Pereira as a powerful and stable fighter who relies on solid positioning inside the cage. However, Ngannou pointed out that Ciryl Gane approaches fights differently, using speed and movement as his main weapons.According to Ngannou, Gane fights more like a lighter athlete even though he is a heavyweight.He said Gane constantly moves. This can make it hard for opponents to track him or land clean shots. This movement, combined with technical skill, could make it difficult for Pereira to close the distance and execute his game plan.Ngannou added that Pereira may struggle to connect effectively. Especially if Gane keeps circling and controlling space. He suggested that Gane’s ability to stay mobile could frustrate Pereira over time. In his view, this stylistic matchup slightly favors the French fighter.The former champion also highlighted his own experience against Gane at UFC 270, where he won by decision. That fight gave him insight into Gane’s strengths and weaknesses. While he respects Pereira’s toughness and striking ability, Ngannou feels Gane’s movement gives him an edge in this particular contest.Still, Ngannou made it clear that both fighters are elite. He expects a close fight that could go either way. He also noted that if Pereira wins, he could achieve history by becoming a champion across three weight divisions.In the end, Ngannou expressed excitement about the matchup. He believes fans will witness a high-level contest between two of the best heavyweights in the sport today.
Article Summary: Francis Ngannou sees Ciryl Gane’s movement as key advantage against Alex Pereira. He believes this fight will come down to style and strategy. The former champion also highlighted his own experience against Gane at UFC 270, where he won by decision.

Article Title: Jaylen Brown Injury Update: Jaylen Brown ruled out with Achilles injury: How serious is it? Breaking down the risk for Boston
Article Text:
Image - X

Jaylen Brown ruled out with Achilles tendinitis as Celtics take playoff-first approach



In the world of the Boston Celtics, there is no word more terrifying than "Achilles." On Friday, that fear became a reality for the Green Team’s faithful when All-Star Jaylen Brown was officially ruled out for a pivotal matchup against the Atlanta Hawks.What started as a seemingly minor report of "left calf tightness" on Thursday was downgraded just hours before tip-off to left Achilles tendinitis. For a fan base that has spent the better part of a year watching Jayson Tatum recover from an Achilles rupture, the news felt like a cruel case of déjà vu.The first thing fans need to understand is the difference between tendinitis and a tear. Tendinitis is essentially inflammation, the body’s way of saying the tendon is overworked and needs a break.It is a common "overuse" injury for explosive athletes like Brown, who rely on jumping and quick lateral movements.While it is not a season-ending injury, it is a significant "red flag." If left untreated, chronic tendinitis can weaken the tendon, making it more susceptible to a serious rupture. By sitting Brown against the Hawks, the Celtics medical staff is choosing a "better safe than sorry" approach, prioritizing the upcoming 2026 playoffs over a late-March regular-season win.There is a silver lining for Brown’s individual accolades. Just before this injury sidelined him, Brown officially played his 65th game of the season. Under the NBA’s current rules, this makes him eligible for season-end awards like MVP and All-NBA.Brown has been the undisputed engine of the Celtics' offense this year, averaging a career-high 28.6 points per game. Having already hit that 65-game mark, both Brown and the Celtics now have the luxury of being extremely cautious with his recovery without worrying about his eligibility for the honors he has clearly earned.With Brown sidelined, the pressure shifts back to Jayson Tatum, who is still working his way back into a full rhythm after his own Achilles journey. The Celtics are currently battling the New York Knicks for the No. 2 seed in the Eastern Conference, and every game counts.However, the team knows that a "Banner 19" run is impossible without a healthy Jaylen Brown. Expect the Celtics to use the "RICE" method (Rest, Ice, Compression, and Elevation) aggressively over the next week. While the word "Achilles" will always cause a panic in Boston, this move appears to be a calculated decision to ensure that the "Jays" are both standing tall when the postseason begins in April.
Article Summary: Jaylen Brown ruled out with Achilles tendinitis as Celtics take playoff-first approach. Tendinitis is essentially inflammation, the body’s way of saying the tendon is overworked and needs a break. The Celtics are currently battling the New York Knicks for the No. 2 seed in the Eastern Conference.

Article Title: Bob Costas: Legendary sportscaster and voice of the Olympics Bob Costas shares bold take on IOC transgender athletes ban dividing sports world
Article Text:
Legendary sportscaster and voice of the Olympics Bob Costas shares bold take on IOC transgender athletes ban dividing sports world (Image via Getty)

Bob Costas backs IOC transgender policy, responds to criticism from Caster Semenya and explains fairness argument

Bob Costas has stepped into one of the most talked-about debates in sports right now. The longtime Olympic broadcaster openly supported the new rules announced by the International Olympic Committee, which limit women’s events at the Olympics to biological females. These rules will start from the Los Angeles 2028 Olympics. The decision has already divided the sports world. Some athletes and fans believe it protects fair competition. Others strongly disagree.One of the biggest critics is Caster Semenya, who called the rules “nonsense.” But Costas sees things very differently. Speaking on CNN, he said the decision is simply about fairness in sport and not about targeting anyone.Bob Costas did not hold back while sharing his views. He clearly said, “Common sense is not transphobic.” For him, the issue is about how sports have always been divided to keep competition fair.He gave simple examples to explain his point. He said high school athletes do not compete with college athletes because of physical differences. In the same way, men’s and women’s sports are separated for a reason.Costas also used a basketball example. He mentioned Caitlin Clark and said if she could compete in the NBA, it would be amazing.But if an average NBA player moved to the WNBA and dominated easily, people would question the fairness.At the same time, Costas made it clear that transgender athletes should be treated with “dignity and respect.” He said the problem starts when physical advantages affect results in competition.The IOC’s new policy also covers athletes with Differences of Sex Development (DSD). Under the rules, athletes must prove they do not gain performance benefits from testosterone. There is one exception for athletes with a rare condition called CAIS, where male puberty does not occur.The policy came after growing pressure, especially after the Paris 2024 Olympics. Boxing champions Imane Khelif and Lin Yu-ting became part of the discussion when questions were raised about eligibility tests.IOC president Kirsty Coventry said the rules are based on science and expert advice. She explained that even small physical differences can decide who wins or loses at the Olympic level. That is why the committee believes these steps are needed.The IOC also plans to use a one-time SRY gene test to decide eligibility. This test can be done through a cheek swab or blood sample and is already used by some sports bodies. Costas, who hosted 12 Olympic Games for NBC from 1988 to 2016, believes the discussion should stay focused on fairness, not politics.
Article Summary: Legendary sportscaster and voice of the Olympics shares bold take on IOC transgender athletes ban dividing sports world. Bob Costas: “Common sense is not transphobic.” For him, the issue is about how sports have always been divided to keep competition fair.

Article Title: New York Giants might be eyeing $18M former Baltimore Ravens WR amid potential reunion as Malik Nabers focuses on recovery
Article Text:
New York Giants might be eyeing $18M former Baltimore Ravens WR amid potential reunion as Malik Nabers focuses on recovery.

New York Giants might be looking for a reunion with Odell Beckham Jr.



The New York Giants experienced a pretty poor run on the field last season, as former coach Brian Daboll was fired in the middle of it all.While John Harbaugh has taken over, it seems he is fully focused on not letting history repeat. As Malik Nabers recovers from an ACL tear, all eyes are on whether the team will be able to replace him in the next season with a trusted wide receiver.Over the last few days, there have been rumors about Odell Beckham Jr.’s reunion with his former team, the New York Giants, and now, the team has broken their silence on the speculations.A few hours ago, as per Paul Schwartz of the New York Post, the New York Giants’ coach, John Harbaugh, opened up about a potential reunion and said, "He and I do talk, and we do text, we've maintained a really great relationship…”John Harbaugh added, “He's one of my very favorite people in the world. So, it's not like you don't talk to guys about things like that. And we certainly have."The New York Giants’ popular coach continued, “We’ll just have to see where it all goes. You know, what’s best for him, what’s best for the Giants. That’s the number one thing. It is what’s best for our team and any player…”He added, “You know, if he helps you be a better team and can make you better, then you’re going to pursue that. So we’ll just have to see where that goes.”However, the veteran wide receiver Odell Beckham Jr. has stayed away from John Harbaugh’s statements as it has sparked a debate among fans.While a few feel Odell Beckham Jr. might not be a strong addition to the team, considering the last time he was spotted on the field was in 2024, others feel he could help the New York Giants.The last few seasons seem to have been pretty rough on the veteran wide receiver. Back in the 2022 season, Odell Beckham Jr. focused on recovering from the brutal ACL tear he had sustained and stayed away from the field.Later, in 2023, he signed a one year deal with the Baltimore Ravens, worth up to $18 million and included $15 million guaranteed.While in 2024, he again signed a one year deal with the Miami Dolphins, Odell Beckham Jr. could only play in nine games as he needed time to recover from surgery after an unspecified injury.This led to the 2025 season, where he sparked controversy after being hit with a six-game suspension in October 2025 for violating the league's performance-enhancing drug policy.
Article Summary: The New York Giants experienced a poor run on the field last season, as former coach Brian Daboll was fired in the middle of it all. As Malik Nabers recovers from an ACL tear, all eyes are on whether the team will be able to replace him in the next season with a trusted wide receiver. John Harbaugh opened up about a potential reunion and said, "He and I do talk, and we do text, we've maintained a really great relationship…”

Article Title: Dave Portnoy: “Going to kill somebody”: Dave Portnoy demands action on Tiger Woods after DUI arrest, latest crash adds to troubling history
Article Text:
Dave Portnoy demands action on Tiger Woods after DUI arrest, latest crash adds to troubling history (Image via Getty)

Dave Portnoy calls out Tiger Woods’ repeated incidents and demands stricter action after latest DUI arrest

Tiger Woods is once again in the news, and this time it is not for golf. The 15-time major winner was arrested on Friday afternoon in Jupiter Island, Florida, after a serious road incident. Police say Woods was trying to overtake a truck and trailer at high speed on a residential road when he hit the back of the vehicle. His SUV flipped onto its side. He climbed out through the passenger window, but things quickly got worse from there. Officers said Woods refused to give a urine sample, which led to his arrest. He was booked around 3pm and later released at about 11pm the same day. He faces charges including DUI, property damage, and refusal to take a lawful test. While a breath test did not show alcohol, police still said he showed signs of being impaired.This is not the first time Woods has been involved in such incidents. Back in 2017, he was arrested for DUI in Florida after being found asleep in his car with drugs in his system. In 2021, he suffered a major crash in California that badly injured his leg and required multiple surgeries. There was also the 2009 crash outside his Florida home that brought heavy public attention to his personal life.Dave Portnoy did not hold back while reacting to the news on his Wake Up Barstool show. He questioned Woods’ choices and made his stance very clear.“What is wrong with Tiger Woods?” Portnoy said. “You can have somebody drive you. He should have a driver with him wherever he goes, there is no excuse.”He continued, “When you get behind the wheel impaired, you’re not just putting yourself at risk. You’re putting anybody else on the road and innocent people at risk.”Portnoy went even further and said, “You can’t make light of it and I have no sympathy for the guy… Put him behind bars, put him in jail for a little bit and make him wake up.”He also added, “Just get a driver. It’s not hard. Seriously, you cannot have sympathy for the guy right now. Get a driver, you’re going to kill somebody innocent.”Meanwhile, PEOPLE reported that Woods does not want to hire a private driver because he does not want someone watching him or knowing his movements. A source told the outlet that Woods believes “he is fine to drive” and prefers to stay at home with his kids, practice golf, or play video games.Officials confirmed that Woods had to spend a minimum time in custody before release. Sheriff John Budensiek said, “It doesn’t matter who you are, if you break the law we’re gonna follow the law.”The latest arrest has once again raised serious concerns around Woods’ safety and decision-making, especially given his past record on the road.
Article Summary: Tiger Woods was arrested on Friday afternoon in Jupiter Island, Florida, after a serious road incident. Police say Woods was trying to overtake a truck and trailer at high speed when he hit the back of the vehicle. He climbed out through the passenger window, but things quickly got worse from there. Officers said Woods refused to give a urine sample, which led to his arrest. He faces charges including DUI, property damage, and refusal to take a lawful test.

New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani appeared alongside former Republican rival Curtis Sliwa in a comedy sketch at the Inner Circle charity gala over the weekend, drawing criticism from some within the Republican Party.The staged parody, part of the long-running Inner Circle musical sketch show, featured Mamdani in a pre-recorded segment undergoing allergy treatment so he could adopt a cat. Sliwa, appeared as a doctor administering the medication, playing on his well-known fondness for cats.The appearance marked a rare moment of humour between the two figures, who were opponents in the 2025 mayoral election. The cat-themed sketch leaned into their public personas, blending Mamdani’s storyline with Sliwa’s long-standing association with feline advocacy.However, Sliwa’s participation triggered backlash from some Republican figures and party insiders. Critics accused him of aligning with a political rival and questioned his loyalty to the party.According to a report by the, some Republican operatives expressed anger over the collaboration, with one accusing Sliwa of "betraying" the party. Former New York Governor David Paterson also criticised the move, calling it inappropriate.The controversy has added to existing tensions around Sliwa’s political positioning, with some critics continuing to link his actions during the mayoral race to Mamdani’s victory.Despite the criticism, the sketch was part of a charity event known for political satire, where public figures across party lines often participate in light-hearted performances.
Article Summary: New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani appeared alongside former Republican rival Curtis Sliwa in a comedy sketch at the Inner Circle charity gala over the weekend. Article Title: Ex-Army captain on the run after murdering wife caught after LPG booking reveals his MP hideout
Article Text: FAZILKA: Sandeep Tomar, a convicted former Army captain who had been on the run for nearly four years after being found guilty of strangling his wife, was traced by police in collaboration with NATGRID (National Intelligence Grid) and subsequently arrested from Pandhurna district in Madhya Pradesh on Saturday.Tomar was convicted of the murder of his wife, Shweta Singh, in 2013. The incident occurred at the Abohar cantonment in Punjab, just five months after their marriage.He initially claimed that she had committed suicide, but forensic investigations later revealed that she had been strangled. He was sentenced to life imprisonment by a local court in 2014 and subsequently dismissed from the Army. After spending five years in Ferozepur jail, he was granted bail by the Punjab and Haryana High Court in 2019 while his appeal was pending. When the High Court upheld his life sentence in September 2022, Tomar failed to surrender and went into hiding.According to information, during his four years as a fugitive, he lived under a false identity. He reportedly worked as a real estate agent in Zirakpur, moved to Odisha, then Bengaluru, and finally to Pandhurna, part of the erstwhile Chhindwara district in Madhya Pradesh, where he was working as a manager at a juice factory.He had also reportedly remarried while absconding.The arrest of ex-Captain Sandeep Tomar was the result of a coordinated effort between Fazilka police and national intelligence agencies. Despite living under a false identity for nearly four years, two specific digital footprints led to his capture. During this period, Tomar moved between Zirakpur, Odisha, and Bengaluru before settling in Pandhurna. To sustain himself, he took up a job as a manager at a juice factory. While he used a fake name in daily life, he used his original PAN card to open a new salary bank account and used that account to book an LPG cylinder refill.The Special Investigation Team (SIT) collaborated with NATGRID to monitor financial records linked to his original identity. When his PAN was used to open the account, it triggered an alert. Police tracked the flagged bank account and noticed a recurring monthly salary deposit from a firm in Madhya Pradesh. The final confirmation of his location came when he used the same account to pay for an LPG cylinder refill. Police then contacted the gas agency, obtained the delivery address, and matched it with mobile tower data from the phone number linked to the account.Once his location in Pandhurna district was confirmed, Fazilka police shared the intelligence with the Superintendent of Police there. The local police team arrested him at his residence. He was subsequently brought back to Punjab on transit remand and sent to judicial custody in Abohar on March 28, 2026.The arrest of Tomar, a former Army captain, brings an end to a high-profile manhunt that had gained renewed urgency after the Punjab and Haryana High Court directed the Punjab DGP to provide an update on the case by April 2026.
Article Summary: Sandeep Tomar was convicted of the murder of his wife, Shweta Singh, in 2013. The incident occurred at the Abohar cantonment in Punjab, just five months after their marriage. He initially claimed that she had committed suicide, but forensic investigations later revealed she had been strangled. He was sentenced to life imprisonment by a local court in 2014 and subsequently dismissed from the Army.

Lucas Giolito Age, Fit, and Competitive Window

Theare heading into the 2026 season with a big decision to make. Their starting rotation still has gaps, and they need to fix them if they want to stay competitive. With Yu Darvish’s $15 million no longer counting against the payroll due to his restricted-list status, the team now has money to spend.That has broughtinto the picture. He is coming off a solid 2025 season and is one of the better options available. The Padres need a reliable starter, and Giolito could be that player. The main question is whether this move makes sense for both sides.The San Diego Padres’ rotation has some experience but also a lot of uncertainty. Joe Musgrove is expected to return after Tommy John surgery. Randy Vásquez and Walker Buehler bring promise, but neither is fully reliable right now. The back end, with Matt Waldron and Griffin Canning, does not offer much confidence.If Giolito signs, the rotation looks stronger and more balanced:• Nick Pivetta• Michael King• Joe Musgrove• Randy Vásquez• Germán Márquez• Lucas Giolito (if signed)This group would give the Padres more depth and help them manage injuries and workload better across the season.Recent sourced reportings state that Lucas Giolito could get a three-year, $61 million deal.But the market may push that lower. A two-year deal worth around $40 million with a team option looks more realistic.• 2026: $17 million, joining after the Darvish situation is settled• 2027: $20 million with a $3 million buyout• 2028: Voidable optionThis kind of deal works for both sides. The Padres avoid a long commitment, and Giolito still gets a solid contract.The San Diego Padres would gain depth and flexibility. They could move Waldron or Canning to other roles if needed. They also make good use of the money freed up by Darvish.Giolito benefits as well. He gets a spot in a competitive team instead of joining a rebuilding side. His workload can stay controlled after pitching 145 innings last season. He also joins a team with stars like Fernando Tatis Jr., Xander Bogaerts, and Jackson Merrill.Giolito’s numbers from last season show he is still reliable. He had a 3.41 ERA with 121 strikeouts in 145 innings.At the same time, his career 4.30 ERA shows he can be inconsistent. There is some risk of regression. The Padres’ defense should help reduce damage, but it is still something to watch.Lucas Giolito is 31 years old and fits the Padres’ style of pitching. He is younger than Darvish and still in a good phase of his career. The team’s average age is 27.5, with several key players under 30. That lines up well for the next two seasons.Also read: MLB trader rumors: New York Mets positioned to bag former $38.5 million Boston Red Sox star ahead of Atlanta Braves to bolster rotation This move carries some risk, but it also has clear upside. The Padres get a stable starter without locking themselves into a long deal. Giolito gets a chance to pitch for a team that wants to win.If the deal happens, the Padres improve their chances in 2026. It may not guarantee a title, but it puts them in a much better position.
Article Summary: Lucas Giolito is coming off a solid 2025 season and is one of the better options available. The San Diego Padres’ rotation has some experience but also a lot of uncertainty. Joe Musgrove is expected to return after Tommy John surgery. Randy Vásquez and Walker Buehler bring promise but neither is fully reliable.

Article Title: Travis Kelce: Travis Kelce’s unexpected Taylor Swift moment grabs attention just before his $12 million Chiefs signing
Article Text:
Travis Kelce and Taylor Swift (Image Via Getty)

Travis Kelce and Patrick Mahomes share emotional and fun moments as Chiefs confirm his return

The biggest moment of Travis Kelce ’s day was supposed to be his new contract. But just seconds before putting pen to paper, something else caught his attention. As he walked through Arrowhead Stadium, he paused near a photo of Taylor Swift from her concert there. He smiled, waved, and softly said, “Hey sweetie, how are you?” It was a small moment, but it said a lot.This came right before Kelce signed a one-year deal worth $12 million with the Kansas City Chiefs on March 23. The video was shared by the team, giving fans a behind-the-scenes look. Even on a big career day, his fiancée was clearly on his mind. It felt natural, not planned, and that is what made it special.The video did not stop at that sweet moment. As Kelce continued through his day, he got a surprise call from teammate Patrick Mahomes. On FaceTime, Mahomes said, “Congrats man. I just wanted to call to say congratulations. I know you’ve got stuff going on.” Kelce laughed and showed off his beard, while Mahomes joked, “With the beard too?” It felt like two close friends talking, not just teammates.Kelce also spoke directly to fans. He said, “It’s exciting times and I’m just ready to get back into the team uniform.” Later, in a message shared on Instagram, he added, “Chiefs Kingdom, let’s go baby, it’s official! Excited for 2026 and just excited to put on a Chiefs uniform in front of you guys again.”He also told fans, “Let’s get Arrowhead rocking baby.”This new deal means Kelce will return for his 14th season in the National Football League. Just days earlier, on The Pat McAfee Show (March 10), he opened up about why he decided to come back. He said, “We share the same love for what we do.” Talking about Swift, he added that their shared passion played a role in his thinking.He also made it clear that his love for football is still strong. “I’m still in love with this game. I still love going to work, putting on the pads, grinding it out and just playing the game,” Kelce said.He explained that staying with the Chiefs felt right because of the team, the coaches, and the environment he trusts.
Article Summary: Travis Kelce signed a one-year deal worth $12 million with the Kansas City Chiefs on March 23. As he walked through Arrowhead Stadium, he paused near a photo of Taylor Swift from her concert there. The video was shared by the team, giving fans a behind-the-scenes look.
